zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble於1190年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧時，他的父親Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I30歲，母親Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais25歲。他於1214年4月與Isabelle de Garlande在法國崔洛易特奧維利爾--a迪乃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1256年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦波奧蒙吉素爾-瓦享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble was born in 1190, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I, was 30 and his mother, Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, was 25. He married Isabelle de Garlande in April 1214, in Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1256, in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble est né en 1190, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Garlande en avril 1214, à Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1256, à Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble 1190 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I 30 und seine Mutter Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais 25. Er hat im April 1214 in Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich Isabelle de Garlande geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1256 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble è nato il nel 1190 nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Garlande nel aprile 1214, nel Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1256, nel Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemombleが1190年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで生まれた時，父Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais Iは30歳，母Alix de Corbeil-Beauvaisは25歳であった。1214年4月にフランスセントアロイアーエトアウヴィリールス-エン-グaティナイスでIsabelle de Garlandeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1256年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼビーウモント-スル-オイゼで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble(이)가 1190년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1214년 4월 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 오비리어스--그a틴아이에서 Isabelle de Garlande(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1256년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 보몽-수-이스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble nasceu em 1190, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Garlande em abril de 1214, em Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1256, em Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble родился в 1190 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Garlande апрель 1214 г. в местности аувиллиирс-ен-гaтинеи, лоирет, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1256 г. в местности бомонт-сур-оис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur de Gatinais Jean de Beaumont-en-Gâtinais Sr de Villemomble nació en 1190, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Adam de Beaumont du Gatinais I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alix de Corbeil-Beauvais, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Garlande en abril de 1214, en Auvilliers-en-Gâtinais, Loiret, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1256, en Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
